<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT\Signer; use Lcobucci\JWT\Signer; use SodiumException; use function sodium_crypto_sign_detached; use function sodium_crypto_sign_verify_detached; final class Eddsa implements Signer { public function algorithmId(): string { return 'EdDSA'; } public function sign(string $payload, Key $key): string { try { return sodium_crypto_sign_detached($payload, $key->contents()); } catch (SodiumException $sodiumException) { throw new InvalidKeyProvided($sodiumException->getMessage(), 0, $sodiumException); } } public function verify(string $expected, string $payload, Key $key): bool { try { return sodium_crypto_sign_verify_detached($expected, $payload, $key->contents()); } catch (SodiumException $sodiumException) { throw new InvalidKeyProvided($sodiumException->getMessage(), 0, $sodiumException); } } }
